queries.question: Show me cities where more than 60,000 people live and foreign born population of that places.
queries.sql: select municipality, Foreign_born_Population from population where Total_Population > 60000
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?municipality ?foreign_born_population WHERE {
  ?population a :Population .
  ?population p:Municipality ?municipality .
  ?population p:Foreign_born_Population ?foreign_born_population .
  ?population p:Total_Population ?total_population_f .
  FILTER(?total_population_f > 60000)
}

  ?population p:Municipality ?municipality .
}

queries.question: show me immigrants in each city
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/demographics/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?naturalized_citizens ?municipality WHERE {
  ?population a :Population .
  ?population p:Naturalized_Citizens ?naturalized_citizens .
  ?population p:Municipality ?municipality .
}
